get.description: Get current network information, statistics, nodes, organizations, SCP analysis fields, and organization horizonUrl values when reported.

parameters.name: at
parameters.description: Fetch at specific point in time

get.description: Server-sent event stream that emits current network snapshots as network events for live dashboards.
Faceted search for current validators, nodes, organizations, and archive-related network metadata.
Fixed node-only alias for the current network search endpoint. Uses the same bounded filters and facet response as /v1/search with type=node.
Fixed organization-only alias for the current network search endpoint. Uses the same bounded facet response as /v1/search with type=organization.

parameters.name: at
parameters.description: Latest snapshots at specific point in time

get.description: Get the latest updated organization snapshots in the network

parameters.name: at

parameters.name: at

parameters.name: publicKey
parameters.description: Public Key of the node to return

get.description: Returns all crawled organizations, including horizonUrl when reported by Stellar TOML metadata.
Returns aggregate FBAS quorum metrics from the latest completed network scan measurement. The endpoint does not run live analysis and does not include persisted proof sets.

404.description: No latest completed network scan was found

get.description: Returns a read-only aggregate of API health, persisted data freshness, archive queue health, and worker health.
Returns the API process status from the responding origin.
Returns configured frontend target status from local configuration. It does not probe the frontend.
Returns configured Horizon target status from local configuration. It does not probe Horizon.
Returns configured Stellar RPC target status from local configuration. It does not probe RPC.
Returns configured failover frontend/API targets from local configuration. It does not probe failover targets.
Returns latest persisted network scan and archive scan timestamps with age and freshness status. It does not run live scans.
Returns a read-only aggregate of persisted data freshness, raw scan continuity, daily rollup continuity, and archive queue health.
Returns persisted raw network scan counts and completion percentages for a bounded recent window. It does not run live scans.
Returns persisted raw-completed-scan counts compared with daily network rollup crawl counts for the last complete UTC days. It does not run rollup jobs.
Returns queue health derived from persisted archive scan jobs.
Returns archive worker and community scanner aggregate status without exposing worker secrets or contact emails.
Returns the internal and external sources StellarAtlas uses for non-adversarial parity and cross-reference review. This endpoint does not probe external systems.

Returns recent persisted RADAR versus StellarAtlas API documentation comparison snapshot summaries. This endpoint does not fetch RADAR, run live probes, recompute comparisons, or include operation-level diff payloads.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of snapshot summaries to return.

200.description: recent API docs comparison snapshot summaries

get.summary: Get latest API documentation cross-check snapshot
get.description: Returns the latest persisted RADAR versus StellarAtlas API documentation comparison snapshot. This endpoint does not fetch RADAR or run live probes.

200.description: latest persisted API docs comparison snapshot

204.description: No API docs comparison snapshot has been stored

get.description: Returns persisted StellarAtlas organization evidence from the latest network snapshot for external cross-reference review. External RADAR comparison is explicitly not probed by this endpoint.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of organization rows to return.

get.description: Returns persisted StellarAtlas validator evidence from the latest network snapshot for external cross-reference review. External RADAR comparison is explicitly not probed by this endpoint.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of validator rows to return.

get.description: Returns persisted StellarAtlas archive verification evidence prepared for external cross-reference review. External RADAR comparison is explicitly not probed by this endpoint.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of archive rows to return.

get.description: Returns the requested organization, including horizonUrl when reported by Stellar TOML metadata.

parameters.name: at
parameters.description: Fetch at specific point in time

get.description: Get the latest snapshots of an organization

parameters.name: at
parameters.description: Latest snapshots at specific point in time

get.summary: Get the latest history scan by url
get.description: Returns the latest history scan by url

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: url of the history archive (url encoded)

get.description: Returns a bounded list of the latest public history archive scan state per archive URL.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of archive scan rows to return.

get.description: Returns a read-only queue snapshot for unfinished history archive scan jobs.
Returns a read-only worker-slot snapshot derived from currently taken archive scan jobs.
Returns recent completed scan entries and active queue entries for a history archive URL.

parameters.name: encodedUrl
parameters.description: URL of the history archive, URL encoded

get.summary: Get the latest archive scan by URL
get.description: Returns the latest history archive scan for a URL.

parameters.name: encodedUrl
parameters.description: URL of the history archive, URL encoded

post.description: Creates a community scanner identity and returns a one-time API key. Contact email and the stored API key hash are never returned by this public response.

apiKey.description: One-time API key. It is hashed before persistence and cannot be read again.

429.description: Too many scanner registration attempts from this source

post.description: Authenticates a community scanner with its one-time API key and updates its heartbeat timestamp.

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: Bearer API key returned by registration

401.description: Missing or invalid bearer API key

403.description: Scanner is blacklisted or temporarily blocked

get.summary: Claim the next community scanner job
get.description: Authenticates a community scanner, refreshes its heartbeat, enforces scanner claim admission controls, atomically marks one pending history archive scan job as taken, and attributes the claim to that scanner.

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: Bearer API key returned by registration

401.description: Missing or invalid bearer API key

403.description: Scanner is blacklisted or temporarily blocked

post.summary: Refresh a community scanner job heartbeat
post.description: Authenticates a community scanner, refreshes its scanner heartbeat, and updates a taken scan job only when that scanner owns the claim.

parameters.name: remoteId
parameters.description: Remote id of the claimed scan job

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: Bearer API key returned by registration

400.description: Invalid scanner id or scan job id

401.description: Missing or invalid bearer API key

403.description: Scanner is blacklisted or temporarily blocked

404.description: Scanner not found or scan job is not owned and active

post.description: Authenticates a community scanner, validates that the scan job is active and owned by that scanner, stores the scan result with attribution, marks the job done, and updates scanner completion metrics.

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: Bearer API key returned by registration

400.description: Invalid scanner id or scan body

401.description: Missing or invalid bearer API key

403.description: Scanner is blacklisted, temporarily blocked, or job is owned by another scanner

404.description: Scanner or scan job not found

get.description: Returns aggregate community scanner metrics. Active/offline counts are derived from heartbeat freshness and scanner blocking state, and no contact email or API key material is returned.

permanentlyBlacklistedScanners.description: Scanners blocked by the permanent blacklist flag.

temporarilyBlockedScanners.description: Scanners with is_blacklisted=false and a future blacklisted_until expiry.

claimDeniedByBlockedScanners.description: Scanners whose first claim-denial reason is blocked status.

claimDeniedByActiveJobLimitScanners.description: Scanners whose first claim-denial reason is the active job cap.

claimDeniedByProductionScoreScanners.description: Scanners whose first claim-denial reason is production success score.

claimIneligibleScanners.description: Scanners currently denied by any claim policy reason.

probationaryScanners.description: Scanners below the completed-job threshold for production scoring.

claimEligibleScanners.description: Scanners currently passing claim-admission policy; queue availability is reported separately.

claimPolicyMaxActiveJobsPerScanner.description: Active taken-job cap used by community scanner claim admission.

claimPolicyMinJobsForProductionScore.description: Completed plus failed job threshold before production score is enforced.

claimPolicyMinSuccessRate.description: Minimum success rate required after the probation window.

staleScanJobAgeMs.description: Taken jobs older than this window are ignored for active-job denial counts.

get.summary: Claim the next pending history scan job
get.description: Internal authenticated worker endpoint. Atomically marks one pending history archive scan job as taken and returns it to a scanner.

post.summary: Refresh a taken history scan job
post.description: Internal authenticated worker endpoint. Updates the heartbeat timestamp for a taken scan job so long-running archive scans are not treated as stale.

parameters.name: remoteId
parameters.description: Remote id of the claimed scan job

404.description: Scan job is not currently taken

get.description: Returns network measurements for the requested time window.

Returns monthly aggregate network measurements for the requested time window.
Returns recently observed SCP statement evidence with optional node and slot filters.

parameters.name: limit
